paper.title_en: Bayesian analysis of the complex singlet model with phase transition gravitational waves
paper.abstract_en: We explore the prospects of probing the complex singlet extension of the Standard Model (CxSM) with gravitational waves from the electroweak phase transition. The study establishes a connection of the scalar potential parameters, the thermodynamic properties of the phase transition, with the directly measured stochastic gravitational-wave background in the presence of astrophysical background and foreground. Considering the space-based gravitational-wave detector Taiji, we construct a frequency-domain likelihood that incorporates instrumental and astrophysical noises, and we perform both Fisher-matrix forecasts and Bayesian nested sampling analysis. The comparison of these two approaches demonstrates consistent parameter recovery and highlights the sensitivity of Taiji to millihertz gravitational-wave signals. We further propagate the inferred constraints on the gravitational-wave spectrum back to the underlying CxSM parameters, obtaining meaningful limits on the Higgs self-couplings. The results emphasize the complementarity between gravitational-wave observations and collider measurements, showing that future missions such as Taiji can serve as a powerful probe of electroweak-scale new physics and the dynamical origin of the Higgs sector.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 论文针对复杂单态扩展模型与引力波相变进行了贝叶斯分析，方法严谨，与PTA主题高度相关。
decision.title_zh: 具有相变引力波的复杂单态模型的贝叶斯分析
decision.abstract_zh: 我们探索了通过电弱相变产生的引力波来探测标准模型复杂单态扩展（CxSM）的前景。该研究建立了标量势参数、相变的热力学性质与在存在天体物理背景和前景的情况下直接测量的随机引力波背景之间的联系。考虑基于空间的引力波探测器Taiji，我们构建了一个包含仪器和天体物理噪声的频域似然函数，并进行了Fisher矩阵预测和贝叶斯嵌套采样分析。这两种方法的比较表明参数恢复一致，并突出了Taiji对毫赫兹引力波信号的灵敏度。我们进一步将推断出的引力波谱约束反推到潜在的CxSM参数上，得到了希格斯自耦合的有意义的限制。结果强调了引力波观测与对撞机测量之间的互补性，表明像Taiji这样的未来任务可以作为电弱尺度新物理和希格斯扇区动力学起源的有力探测器。
